name: Steel Pile
description: Driven steel H-pile or pipe pile — AS 5100.7 §6.2.5; most vulnerable to scour

name: Concrete Pile
description: Precast or cast-in-situ concrete pile — AP-G71.8 §4 foundation classification

name: Timber Pile
description: Driven hardwood or treated timber pile — heritage bridges; high scour vulnerability

name: Spread / Pad Footing
description: Shallow spread footing on soil — susceptible to scour undermining

name: Rock Bearing / Socketed
description: Footing bearing directly on or socketed into bedrock — low scour risk

name: Open Caisson / Cofferdam
description: Large-diameter drilled shaft or caisson foundation

name: Well Foundation
description: Mass concrete well sunk through soil — older masonry bridges

name: Raft / Mat Foundation
description: Continuous mat slab under multiple pier columns
